steps.title: Follow the battery failure
steps.content: The devices have internal batteries that cannot be removed and replaced. When those batteries stop working, the devices can no longer function and are typically thrown away as waste.

steps.title: Reject positive or irrelevant words
steps.content: B contradicts the idea that the devices are discarded as waste. C describes familiarity, which battery failure does not determine. D describes appearance, which does not explain why dead devices are thrown away. The answer is A.
